calendar.matters:
REPORT OF STATUS OF ADMINISTRATION
TENTATIVE RULING: Continued to 8/4/26. (No earlier availability.)

Issue(s) necessitating continuance:
(1) No proposed order has been lodged or received by the assigned examiner. [LRSF 14.7 A. and 14.59 E.]
(2) No proof of service of notice of this hearing has been filed.
(3) Notice must have attached to it the procedures for how to make a remote appearance by Zoom and CourtCall, as well as remote public access, as set out at https://sf.courts.ca.gov/divisions/probate-court. [LRSF 14.1 C.6.]
(4) It appears that a copy of the Request for Appointment of Probate Referee and a proposed Order Appointing Probate Referee were not left with the clerk to deliver to the director, as set forth in LRSF 14.11. B. (The I&A should have been delivered to the probate referee appointed on 2/25/25 before she retired at the end of April 2025.)
Please provide a proposed order and courtesy copies of any papers filed to address these issues to the assigned examiner by 7/21/26.
Examiner continuances are final and not subject to contest under LRSF 14.10 B.

EXAMINER: HELEN TROWBRIDGE
